data.description: A character’s AC represents how well they are protected.
Various supernatural creatures that embody the magic and mystery of the Feywild.

A summoned creature disappears when it drops to 0 hit points. The creature is friendly to you and your companions. Initiative for summoned creatures is handled as a group. Roll for initiative as a group. They have their own turns, which they obey verbal commands from you (no command required by you). If you issue commands to them, they defend themselves from hostile threats, but otherwise take actions. The spell has the summoning option.
